meta.title: Join the B.Com in Accounting & Finance Program
meta.description: Build your career in finance with the BCom in Accounting and Finance degree at Teksversity. Learn accounting, taxation, auditing, and business analytics.

@graph.name: B.Com (Accounting and Finance)
@graph.description: Explore the B.Com in Accounting and Finance program at Teksversity. Learn accounting, taxation, finance, auditing, and investment management with expert mentors and 100% placement support.

mainEntity.name: What is B.Com in Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: B.Com in Accounting and Finance is a three-year undergraduate program that focuses on financial accounting, business finance, taxation, auditing, and investment management. It prepares students for careers in banking, finance, corporate accounting, and financial analysis.

mainEntity.name: What are the key subjects in B.Com Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course includes Financial Accounting, Cost Accounting, Corporate Finance, Business Law, Taxation, Auditing, and Portfolio Management. It also introduces financial modeling, data analytics, and modern accounting tools used in the finance industry.

mainEntity.name: What is the career scope of B.Com in Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Financial Analysts, Accountants, Investment Advisors, Tax Consultants, Auditors, or Finance Executives. They can also pursue professional courses like CA, CMA, CFA, or MBA in Finance to advance their careers.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between B.Com General and B.Com Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: A general B.Com covers all commerce areas, while B.Com in Accounting and Finance focuses specifically on financial management, taxation, auditing, and investment analysis, preparing students for specialized finance and accounting careers.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue higher education after completing B.Com in Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students can pursue MBA in Finance, M.Com, CFA, or global certifications like CPA and ACCA. These qualifications enhance expertise in accounting, corporate finance, and investment management.

mainEntity.name: Why should I choose Teksversity for B.Com in Accounting and Finance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity’s B.Com in Accounting and Finance program blends academic theory with practical finance training, live projects, and expert mentorship, ensuring students become industry-ready for finance and accounting roles.

mainEntity.name: From which university will I receive my B.Com Accounting and Finance degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: The degree is awarded by a UGC-recognized university partner, making it valid for global employment and further studies such as CA, MBA, or CPA certifications.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer practical finance training or internships in this course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Teksversity offers hands-on experience through real accounting projects, financial simulations, and internships with corporate and financial organizations.

mainEntity.name: What kind of placement support is available for B.Com Accounting and Finance students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance, including interview preparation, resume building, recruiter tie-ups, and LinkedIn optimization for jobs in accounting, finance, and investment firms.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer certifications along with the B.Com program?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students receive guidance and training for Tally ERP, GST, MS Excel for Finance, and Financial Analytics certifications, which enhance employability and professional credibility.

heading: Overview of
BCom in Accounting and Finance Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Career in Commerce, Accounting, and Financial Management

content.value: Build a successful career in commerce, accounting, and finance with the BCom in

at Teksversity. This online BCom degree equips learners with a deep understanding of financial systems, auditing, taxation, and business analytics. With practical exposure and expert mentorship, students gain analytical, ethical, and technical skills to pursue careers in finance, banking, auditing, or entrepreneurship and prepare for professional courses like CA, CMA, or CPA.

keyPoints: Prepare for CA, CMA, and finance roles.

heading: Why Choose BCom in Accounting and Finance
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity for your BCom in Finance and Accounting means joining a program built to combine academic excellence with practical financial learning. Each subject is designed to prepare students for real-world business and accounting challenges through live case studies, simulations, and software-based projects led by expert faculty.

description.firstDescription: Our applied learning approach ensures students not only master theoretical frameworks but also apply them using real accounting tools, financial modeling, and business analytics software. Interactive projects, workshops, and presentations help build confidence, attention to detail, and professionalism key traits for success in the financial world.

description.secondDescription:
Beyond academics, Teksversity offers robust placement assistance, personalized mentorship, and industry networking opportunities. From resume building to mock interviews and career counseling, we ensure every learner is ready for top-tier financial careers.
At Teksversity, your BCom Financial Accounting degree becomes a gateway to long-term success in the evolving global financial sector.

keyPoints: Financial report preparation and auditing practice
Expert webinars and live Q&A sessions

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description:
Get complete insights into the BCom in Accounting and Finance program at Teksversity your first step toward becoming a future-ready finance professional. Explore how our curriculum blends academic rigor with practical learning to help you succeed in the modern financial world.
With real-time case studies, expert-led mentorship, and 100% placement assistance, the program ensures every learner gains the confidence and competence to excel in accounting, auditing, taxation, and financial management.
downloadOurCourseBrochure.subHeading: What You’ll Get in the Brochure:
highlights: Career pathways in finance and accounting.

This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
